items.title: Keep Google-backed automation evidence on visible browser context
items.question: Do weekly automation summaries record URL, visible account, visible file/context, and blocker label when exact metadata cannot be read?

items.title: Watch MOHW social-work staffing and training-capacity windows
items.question: Did the June 29 training-organization window produce a follow-up notice?

items.title: Turn FSC eNotice expansion into a consumer checklist only if FAQ appears
items.question: Has FSC, TDCC, or a financial institution published a consumer-facing explanation of expanded eNotice use?

items.title: Define Codex Remote approval boundaries before operational use
items.question: Which recurring automation actions may be approved from phone, and which still require desktop/browser-visible account context?

items.title: Use InfoCenter rhythm as planning context, not payroll evidence
items.question: Does the work-rhythm page help assignment timing without exposing raw titles, comments, or payroll-sensitive data?

items.title: Sketch one manual reward-loop prototype before building gamification
items.question: Can one weekly challenge plus a visible non-monetary status signal produce repeat participation before any platform work?
